issues.description: Action lacks required condition filtering. Text specifies K.O. target must have cost ≤ opponent's Life card count. DSL missing condition that evaluates opponent's Life count and restricts character selection by cost threshold.

Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is unrestricted. Must include cost-based condition constraint or use conditional targeting mechanism to enforce 'cost equal to or less than number of opponent's Life cards' rule.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards.
